description:
About the job
Location - Sydney, Australia (Onsite)

Employment Type - Full-time 

Role Summary

We’re hiring a Senior Software Engineer to take ownership of designing and delivering 
scalable software platforms across our product ecosystem. This role is for someone who 
can architect systems end-to-end, build robust APIs and integrations, and lead 
engineering execution with a strong bias to pragmatic delivery. 

You’ll operate across backend services, data flows, and modern web applications -
working on multi-tenant platforms, integrations with external providers, automation/ETL 
pipelines, security controls, and operational reliability. You will collaborate closely with 
senior stakeholders, and you will be expected to make strong technical decisions and own 
outcomes. 

What You’ll Be Doing (Core Responsibilities)

System Architecture & Engineering Leadership 
• Design and evolve scalable architectures for API platforms, internal systems, and 
customer-facing applications. 
• Own technical decisions: trade-offs, standards, patterns, documentation, and 
delivery timelines. 
• Drive best practices across performance, reliability, observability, and security. 

Backend/API Engineering 
• Build and maintain RESTful APIs (and where suitable, event-driven services) with a 
focus on correctness, stability, and clean contracts. 
• Implement auth patterns (OAuth2, token-based auth, RBAC), versioned APIs, and 
compatibility strategies. 
• Integrate with external systems/providers and manage resilient error handling, 
retries, idempotency, and auditing. 

Data & Automation (ETL / Workflows) 
• Design and implement data pipelines, scheduled jobs, reconciliation processes, 
and reporting automation. 
• Work with SQL models, ensuring data integrity and high-quality outputs. 
• Improve operational tooling: monitoring, alerts, dashboards, and runbooks. 

Frontend Enablement (When Needed) 
• Collaborate on front-end feature delivery (Vue/Next.js) to support end-to-end 
outcomes. 
• Help define component architecture, state management approaches, and 
integration patterns. 

DevOps & Operational Excellence 
• Partner with infrastructure to improve CI/CD workflows, deployment safety, and 
environment consistency. 
• Ensure systems are observable: structured logging, metrics, tracing, and actionable 
alerts. 
• Improve security posture: secrets management, least-privilege access, secure 
coding, and incident readiness. 

What Success Looks Like (Outcomes) 

• APIs are stable, versioned, well-documented, and easy for internal/external 
consumers to adopt. 
• Integrations are resilient (idempotent, observable, measurable) and don’t create 
“mystery failures.” 
• Architecture decisions reduce complexity over time (fewer band-aids, fewer 
rewrites). 
• Delivery is predictable, and systems are easier to operate and scale. 

Tech Stack (Current / Typical) 

(Experience in most of these is ideal, but strong adjacent skills are acceptable.) 
• Backend: PHP (Laravel), Node.js 
• Frontend: Vue.js (Vue 3) 
• Databases: PostgreSQL, SQL 
• Infrastructure: AWS, Nginx, Linux 
• Auth/Security: OAuth2, JWT, RBAC, API gateways/reverse proxies 
• Tooling: Git, CI/CD pipelines, testing frameworks 

Required Experience & Skills 
• 5+ years building production systems in backend and/or platform engineering. 
• Strong system design capability: scalable architectures, integration patterns, and 
data modeling. 
• Proven experience building APIs that are reliable, secure, and maintainable. 
• Strong SQL skills and ability to reason about performance and data consistency. 
• Practical operational mindset: logging, monitoring, failure modes, and incident 
mitigation. 
• Strong communication: can write clear technical docs and align stakeholders. 

Nice to Have 
• Experience with multi-tenant SaaS design and permission models (RBAC/ABAC). 
• Event-driven architecture (queues, pub/sub), idempotency, sagas, outbox patterns. 
• Experience modernizing legacy systems without “big bang rewrites.” 
• Telecom, payments, or regulated-domain experience (high reliability/compliance).

questions.q: How many years of work experience do you have with Laravel?
How many years of work experience do you have with JavaScript?
How many years of work experience do you have with Microsoft SQL Server?
